title: The Turtlenecks
description: Your baby will love singing along when it’s time to “Too-tooty-too” with The Turtlenecks!
quote: Too-tooty-too goes my kazoo. I will kazoo. Hey how ’bout you?
altHero: two men in turtlenecks playing kazoos
alt1: four men in colorful turtlenecks walk along the grass in a giant mushroom fantasy land
alt2: the Turtlenecks dancing in a line
alt3: two of the Turtlenecks playing with kazoos
